writers-room-evaluate.name: Writers Room — Prose Evaluation
writers-room-evaluate.description: Editorial pass on a Writers Room draft: logline, summary, themes, strengths, issues with excerpts, and concrete suggestions.

writers-room-format.name: Writers Room — Auto-format Prose
writers-room-format.description: Copy-edit pass on a Writers Room draft: paragraphing, dialogue formatting, whitespace, punctuation, and consistent chapter/scene markdown headings. Returns cleaned prose only.

writers-room-script.name: Writers Room — Adapt to Scene Script
writers-room-script.description: Adapt a Writers Room prose draft into a scene-by-scene screenplay-style breakdown with sluglines, action, dialogue, and per-scene visual prompts the image-gen pipeline can render.

writers-room-characters.name: Writers Room — Character Profiles
writers-room-characters.description: Extract a character bible from a Writers Room draft: name, aliases, role, image-gen-ready physical description, personality, and background. Preserves user edits and flags fields the prose does not yet support so the writer knows what to add.

writers-room-settings.name: Writers Room — Setting / World Bible
writers-room-settings.description: Extract a setting/world bible from a Writers Room draft: per-location descriptions keyed by screenplay slugline (palette, era, weather, recurring details). Storyboard scenes match their slugline back to a setting and inject its description into the image prompt for visual continuity.

writers-room-objects.name: Writers Room — Recurring Objects
writers-room-objects.description: Extract a recurring-objects bible from a Writers Room draft: symbolic or physically significant items that appear across multiple scenes (the letter, the fedora, a keepsake). Captures description and narrative significance so the writer can validate continuity.

cd-treatment.name: Creative Director — Treatment
cd-treatment.description: Plan a long-form generated-video project: write the logline, synopsis, and scene-by-scene treatment.

cd-evaluate.name: Creative Director — Scene Evaluation
cd-evaluate.description: Evaluate a freshly-rendered scene against the project style spec and scene intent. Reads multi-frame samples to judge intent across the full clip timeline.

app-detection.name: App Detection
app-detection.description: Analyze a project directory and detect its configuration

cos-agent-briefing.name: CoS Agent Briefing
cos-agent-briefing.description: Brief a sub-agent on their assigned task

cos-evaluate.name: CoS Task Evaluation
cos-evaluate.description: Evaluate pending tasks and decide what to work on

cos-self-improvement.name: CoS Self Improvement
cos-self-improvement.description: Analyze system performance and suggest improvements

memory-evaluate.name: Memory Evaluation
memory-evaluate.description: Evaluate agent output to extract useful memories

brain-weekly-review.name: Brain Weekly Review
brain-weekly-review.description: Generate weekly review and open loops analysis

soul-contradiction-detector.name: Soul Contradiction Detector
soul-contradiction-detector.description: Analyze soul documents for internal contradictions and inconsistencies

soul-enrichment.name: Soul Enrichment
soul-enrichment.description: Generate follow-up questions to enrich soul documents

soul-enrichment-process.name: Soul Enrichment Processor
soul-enrichment-process.description: Process enrichment answers for inclusion in soul documents

soul-test-generator.name: Soul Test Generator
soul-test-generator.description: Generate behavioral tests from soul content

soul-test-scorer.name: Soul Test Scorer
soul-test-scorer.description: Score AI responses against expected soul behavioral patterns

soul-writing-analyzer.name: Soul Writing Analyzer
soul-writing-analyzer.description: Extract communication patterns from writing samples

twin-trait-extractor.name: Twin Trait Extractor
twin-trait-extractor.description: Extract quantitative personality traits from twin documents

twin-confidence-analyzer.name: Twin Confidence Analyzer
twin-confidence-analyzer.description: Analyze completeness and confidence of twin personality definition

twin-import-analyzer.name: Twin Import Analyzer
twin-import-analyzer.description: Extract personality insights from imported external data
